title: Add a wax crayon brush (textured, buildup at constant hue)
visualNotes: Dense, well-contained strokes with crisp broken edges and a convincing constant-hue progression across lifted passes. Continuous retracing also fills most gaps. The tooth is uneven and concentrated toward edges, leaving the centers rather flat and marker-like; later passes become nearly solid. Crossings occlude cleanly with no visible mixing. The full drawing is attractive and readable but broad green/red areas reveal sparse, somewhat repetitive white chips rather than fine all-over paper grain.
